raw_consumer_statement:
Ref. XXXX Disputed Amount XXXX. 

Was charged XXXX by XXXX through a hotel reservation due to technical glitches on their website which they never accepted. I made an additional reservation so the hotel could reconsider our stay there and I could pay the difference of the original non-refundable reservation ( same dates ). What XXXX and the hotel did was that they totally ignored my requests by ignoring my messages to them. Instead they wanted me to pay over XXXX dollars for just a XXXX nights. In other words, they collected XXXX already without me staying there AT ALL with my family on a coming vacation in XXXX and still wanted to collect the full amount in another reservation once we stay there for another XXXX and change. Total robbery in my view.
